title: SpaceX’s ‘otherworldly’ debut could squeeze the oxygen from Europe’s IPO market, analysts say
summary: Elon Musk's SpaceX, expected to debut next month, could squeeze investor demand for other IPOs.

title: SpaceX IPO set to hand $20bn stake to one hedge fund
summary: D1 Capital is among the Wall Street firms in line for big rewards if the rocket maker successfully lists next month
